text: Artificial intelligence is transforming the modern workplace in several important ways. One of the most visible changes is automation, where AI handles repetitive tasks like data entry, scheduling, and basic customer service. This frees up employees to focus on more creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI are also becoming common. For example, smart assistants can help manage emails, while software can analyse large amounts of data quickly, helping teams make better decisions. However, rather than replacing humans, the best results come from human-AI collaboration. AI provides suggestions, but people use their judgement to choose the best course of action. As a result, job roles are changing—workers now need to develop skills in areas like critical thinking and technology management.
